---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to how scenes are planned, generated, or placed
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What you'd like to be able to do**
Describe the outcome you want, ideally with an example prompt you'd type.

**Why the skill can't do it well today**
What happens now, and where it falls short.

**How you imagine it working**
Any thoughts on the behavior: planning, generation options, placement logic, post-processing, cost handling, and so on.

**Anything else**
Related tools, reference images, or examples that would help.
